item.title: Pics of the Day - July 2022
item.description:
No sound
Annoying soundtrack removed. You’re welcome.
Sound on
No sound
Sound on
item.dc:creator: picsoftheday

item.title: FIRST FULL PICTURE FROM JAMES WEBB TELESCOPE!!!!
item.dc:creator: Jesussleftsandal

item.title: Astronomer here, super excited about the reveal of the first JWST Deep Field!
item.description: #astronomy #science #JWST Today, they revealed the first imagine from James Webb Space Telescope!! OMG!! The image you see (which I believe will be revealed more fully tomorrow with the rest of the planned released) shows a deep field with foreground galaxy clusters which are lensing galaxy behind them. Lensing in this way provides magnification, allowing much more in depth investigations into galaxies much further away! In this imagine, effectively everything which does not have the star pattern is a background galaxy! Images will be posted here: https://www.nasa.gov/webbfirstimages List of first release targets for tomorrow: https://www.nasa.gov/feature/goddard/2022/nasa-shares-list-of-cosmic-targets-for-webb-telescope-s-first-images Tomorrow their main broadcast will start on the NASA TV YouTube channel at 10:30 EDT! I am super super excited for what is to come! (And for when the data of the project I'm on will be taken next year!)
item.dc:creator: AstroExplained

item.title: In Ukraine, rescuers found a group of puppies under the rubble of a building. Upon closer inspection, they found that the puppies were protecting a litter of kittens!

item.title: Get off my lawn!
item.description: USA, California: Sea lions chasing people at a beach in San Diego! Lifeguards were on standby in the water ensuring no one was hurt. It's recommended people stay at least 50 ft away from sea lions.
item.dc:creator: WakeUp2Yourself
